task: Use the Wikipedia search box to look up 'Transmission Control Protocol' and open the article. Report the exact article title.
Open the torvalds/linux repository and find the file that holds the project's license text (it is surfaced in the repo's 'License' link). Report that file's name.
Find the year the Eiffel Tower was completed. Report only the 4-digit year.
Search arXiv for the paper 'Attention Is All You Need', open its abstract page, and report the arXiv identifier (the number of the form 1706.xxxxx).
Find the birth year of Alan Turing and the birth year of John von Neumann, then report the sum of the two years as a single number.
Determine how many time zones Russia officially spans and report that number.
Identify the name of the ship on which Charles Darwin made his famous scientific voyage. Report only the ship's name.
Identify the mathematician credited with formulating the incompleteness theorems, and report their full name.
Find the chemical symbol for the element Tungsten and report only the symbol.
On MDN, find the reference page for 'Array.prototype.map()' and report, in one sentence, what the map() method does.
